scope: Pass B full-surface expansion against the Klarna Settlements API Swagger embedded in the canonical docs page. JSON list/detail endpoints are covered by streams without changing legacy-emitted record data: the 3 legacy streams remain, and Pass B adds payout_details and payout_summaries. CSV/PDF report downloads are excluded as binary payloads. The Settlements API publishes no POST/PUT/PATCH/DELETE operations.

excluded.reason: CSV report download keyed by payment_reference; the declarative stream engine expects JSON object records, not text/csv report payloads
PDF payout report download keyed by payment_reference; binary documents are outside stream/writes dialect support
CSV summary report download for a date range; the engine cannot parse text/csv report payloads into JSON records without a hook, and no new hook package is allowed in this pass
PDF summary report download for a date range; binary documents are outside stream/writes dialect support
